visa_types.name: Document Legalization Service
visa_types.overview:
Description:
Since Lebanon is not a signatory to The Hague Apostille Convention, any official document destined for this country will be legalized by the Lebanon Embassy for consular and commercial purposes. Legalizing documents for Lebanon may require additional steps before the documents can be presented to the Lebanon Embassy or Consulate office.We accept documents from individuals and representatives on behalf of MEA, Embassy of UAE and Lebanon Embassy to provide a quick and 100% genuine attestation/apostille service. VFS Global also offers a gamut of services that simplifies the entire process of attestation/Apostille with:
- State Attestation
- HRD Attestations
- Chamber of Commerce attestation
- Translation Services
Legalization for the Lebanon Mission shall now be under the purview of VFS Global and you may submit your applications to our dedicated Application centres for any legalization request to the Lebanon Embassy, India.

[lbn > tha > en > Document Legalization Service]
visa_types.full_text:
Description:
Since Lebanon is not a signatory to The Hague Apostille Convention, any official document destined for this country will be legalized by the Lebanon Embassy for consular and commercial purposes. Legalizing documents for Lebanon may require additional steps before the documents can be presented to the Lebanon Embassy or Consulate office.We accept documents from individuals and representatives on behalf of MEA, Embassy of UAE and Lebanon Embassy to provide a quick and 100% genuine attestation/apostille service. VFS Global also offers a gamut of services that simplifies the entire process of attestation/Apostille with:
- State Attestation
- HRD Attestations
- Chamber of Commerce attestation
- Translation Services
Legalization for the Lebanon Mission shall now be under the purview of VFS Global and you may submit your applications to our dedicated Application centres for any legalization request to the Lebanon Embassy, India.

visa_types.overview:
Overview
Airport Transit  Visa application is applicable in case you have to change flights without  leaving the airport. An airport transit visa entitles the holder to enter the  international transit area of the airport, but not the territory of the Lebanon
